data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"b555-bac6","generatedAt":"2026-04-08T04:09:18Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Sprint drift detection and brainstorm suggestion for relates_to coordination links","description":"Extend sprint drift detection to follow relates_to links and add brainstorm suggestion for relates_to links when cross-epic overlap is discovered.","successCriteria":["sprint-drift-check.sh follows relates_to links on the current epic: when a related epic transitioned to closed after the implementation plan was created, emit REPLAN_TRIGGER with the closed epic ID and a summary of what changed \u2014 using the same contract as git-history drift detection","Drift detection is one-hop only: checks direct relates_to neighbors, not neighbors-of-neighbors","Brainstorm's Part C scan suggests relates_to links to open (not closed/archived) epics when cross-epic artifact overlap is discovered during gap analysis","The relates_to link suggestion is presented to the user for approval before creating the link","After deployment, if two epics are linked via relates_to and one closes, the next sprint drift check on the other epic's stories emits REPLAN_TRIGGER \u2014 verified by test scenario with two linked epics"]},"stories":[{"id":"bf53-4686","title":"As a sprint orchestrator, I can detect drift when a related epic closes after implementation planning","description":"Extend sprint-drift-check.sh to follow relates_to links. One-hop only. Emit REPLAN_TRIGGER on related epic closure after impl plan.","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, sprint-drift-check.sh queries relates_to links for the current epic and emits REPLAN_TRIGGER when a related epic closed after the implementation plan was created","When this story is complete, drift detection checks only direct relates_to neighbors and does not traverse neighbors-of-neighbors","When this story is complete, an epic with no relates_to links exits drift detection cleanly without errors","When this story is complete, relates_to links where the related epic closed before the implementation plan was created do not trigger REPLAN_TRIGGER","When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing for all new or modified logic"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Ticket CLI failure during neighbor lookup must warn and continue","[Reliability] Missing implementation plan timestamp should fall back to story creation timestamp","[Testing] Extend existing sprint-drift-check.sh test suite"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC1 (relates_to drift detection) + SC2 (one-hop only)"},{"id":"aadf-24ab","title":"As a brainstorm facilitator, I can suggest relates_to links when cross-epic artifact overlap is discovered","description":"Extend brainstorm Part C scan to suggest relates_to links to open epics on cross-epic overlap. User approval required before link creation.","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, brainstorm's Part C scan suggests relates_to links to open epics when cross-epic artifact overlap is discovered during gap analysis","When this story is complete, the relates_to link suggestion is presented to the user for approval before creating the link","When this story is complete, only open (not closed/archived) epics are suggested as relates_to link targets","When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing for all new or modified logic"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Depends on fed2-b1ce delivering Part C scan","[Testing] User approval interaction should be testable via mock","[Maintainability] Integrate into existing Part C flow"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["fed2-b1ce"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC3 (brainstorm Part C suggests relates_to) + SC4 (user approval)"},{"id":"89cb-a606","title":"As a quality engineer, I can verify end-to-end that relates_to drift detection and link suggestion work together","description":"End-to-end test scenario: two linked epics, one closes, drift check emits REPLAN_TRIGGER. Covers both drift and suggestion paths.","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, a test scenario verifies that when two epics are linked via relates_to and one closes, the next sprint drift check on the other epic emits REPLAN_TRIGGER","When this story is complete, the test scenario covers both the drift detection path and the brainstorm suggestion path","When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing for all new or modified logic"],"considerations":["[Testing] Use ephemeral test tickets, clean up after verification","[Testing] Parse REPLAN_TRIGGER using canonical parsing prefix from replan-observability contract","[Reliability] Test cleanup should remove test epics and links"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["bf53-4686","aadf-24ab"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC5 (end-to-end test scenario)"},{"id":"102b-e734","title":"Update project docs to reflect relates_to drift detection and brainstorm suggestion","description":"Update CLAUDE.md, replan-observability contract, and sprint/brainstorm docs to reflect new relates_to capabilities.","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, existing project documentation accurately describes that sprint drift detection follows relates_to links and that brainstorm Part C suggests relates_to links during gap analysis"],"considerations":[],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["bf53-4686","aadf-24ab","89cb-a606"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Documentation alignment for SC1-SC4"}],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":4,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":["bf53-4686","aadf-24ab","89cb-a606","102b-e734"]}}
